title: It seems/appears (that) + S + V

formulas.zh: 看起來似乎……（用 that 子句描述推測內容）

formulas.formula: It seems/appears as if/as though + S + V ...
formulas.zh: 看起來好像……（語氣更強調「彷彿」的感覺）

explanation: 此句型以虛主詞 It 開頭，搭配 seems 或 appears 表示「看起來、似乎」，用於根據外在觀察或間接證據做出推測，語氣較委婉、不確定。that 可省略，後接完整子句。若改用 as if / as though，則強調「彷彿、好像」的假設語氣。seem 較口語常用，appear 較正式書面。注意：主詞也可改為人或事物，如 He seems to be tired，但本句型聚焦於 It 開頭的用法。

examples.eng: It seems that the weather will get worse this weekend.
examples.chi: 看起來這個週末天氣會變得更糟。

examples.eng: It appears that the new policy has had a positive effect on students.
examples.chi: 這項新政策似乎對學生產生了正面的影響。

examples.eng: It seems as if nobody cares about the environmental problems around us.
examples.chi: 似乎沒有人關心我們周遭的環境問題。

examples.eng: It appears that she has already made up her mind to study abroad.
examples.chi: 她似乎已經下定決心要出國留學了。

extension.tip: seem 與 appear 皆表推測，但 appear 較正式，常見於新聞或學術寫作。若要表達「過去看起來如何」，可用 It seemed/appeared that...。另外，as if 後面若描述與事實相反的情境，動詞常用過去式（假設語氣）。

examples.test: It seems that he is honest. vs. He seems to be honest.
examples.result: → 兩句意思相同，前者用 that 子句，後者用不定詞，皆表示「他似乎很誠實」。

examples.test: It appears as if she knew the answer. (但她其實不知道)
examples.result: → as if 後用過去式 knew，表示與事實相反的假設語氣，意為「她看起來好像知道答案（但其實不知道）」。

examples.test: It seems that it will rain. vs. It looks like it will rain.
examples.result: → seems that 較正式委婉，looks like 較口語直接，兩者皆可表達「看起來要下雨了」。

extension.note: seem 推測較主觀，appear 推測較客觀；as if 後面接假設，that 後面接事實。

parts: the students are not satisfied with the exam results.
exercises.sentence: It seems that the students are not satisfied with the exam results.
exercises.translation: 學生們似乎對考試結果不滿意。

parts: that the company will close down by the end of this year.
exercises.sentence: It appears that the company will close down by the end of this year.
exercises.translation: 這家公司似乎會在今年年底前關閉。

parts: he had never heard of the news before.
exercises.sentence: It seems as if he had never heard of the news before.
exercises.translation: 他看起來好像從來沒聽過這個消息。

parts: technology has completely changed the way we communicate.
exercises.sentence: It appears that technology has completely changed the way we communicate.
exercises.translation: 科技似乎已經徹底改變了我們溝通的方式。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的虛主詞句型，表達看起來似乎會下雨
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ that it will rain this afternoon based on the dark clouds.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。『It seems (that)』是標準虛主詞句型，that 可省略，後接完整子句。B 選項『is seeming』錯誤，seem 不用進行式。C 選項『seems as』缺少 if/though，用法不當。D 選項『Seems that』缺少虛主詞 It，不符文法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填入合適選項，表達外表看起來很疲勞的情況
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ that the manager has been working too hard lately.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。『It appears (that)』為標準虛主詞句型，用於根據現象進行推測，此處用現在式表示現在的觀察。B 選項『appearing』為分詞形式，不能充當動詞。C 選項『will appear』改變了句意為未來的表現。D 選項『has appeared』暗示出現完成，與原意不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據上下文選擇正確句型，表達新措施似乎有正面效果
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ as if the new education reform has benefited thousands of students nationwide.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。『It appears as if』用於虛主詞句型搭配假設語氣，強調『彷彿、好像』的推測。B 選項『That appears』缺少虛主詞 It。C 選項『seems likely』改變了結構，後應接不定詞或 that 子句而非 as if。D 選項『is appearing』為進行式，seem/appear 不用進行式表示推測。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適當選項完成句子，關於學生對新課程的反應
mc_exercises.question_eng: It _______ that despite initial resistance, the majority of students have gradually adapted to the revised curriculum.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。『It appears (that)』為虛主詞句型，用現在式搭配完成式子句表達基於現象的推測。A 選項『is seeming』錯誤，seem/appear 不用進行式。C 選項『seems as though it』多加了虛主詞 it，造成重複。D 選項『has been appearing』錯誤，appear 不用現在完成進行式表達推測含義。

translation_exercises.answer: It seems (that) it will rain tomorrow. / It appears (that) it will rain tomorrow.
hints: 提示1：用 It seems/appears + that + 完整子句結構，主詞是 it（天氣），動詞用未來式
提示2：常見錯誤是漏掉虛主詞 It，直接寫 'Seems it will rain'

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 看起來他對這個計畫不太感興趣。
translation_exercises.answer: It seems (that) he is not very interested in this project. / It appears (that) he doesn't seem very interested in this project.
hints: 提示1：虛主詞 It 後接 seems/appears，然後是具有真實主詞 he 的子句
提示2：注意否定形式可用 is not interested 或 doesn't seem interested，但勿混用 seems 與 doesn't seem

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 看起來她好像在隱瞞什麼事情。
translation_exercises.answer: It appears as if she is hiding something. / It seems as though she is concealing something.
key_points: as if / as though 強調假設語氣
現在進行式表示正在進行
hints: 提示1：用 It appears/seems as if/as though 結構來表達「彷彿、好像」的推測，語氣更具假設性
提示2：as if 與 as though 互換但後面不能再用 that，且常搭配現在進行式 is hiding 來強調動作進行中

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 看起來這個決定不僅影響了許多學生，而且還引發了家長們的廣泛討論。
translation_exercises.answer: It appears (that) this decision has not only affected many students but also sparked widespread discussion among parents. / It seems as if this decision has impacted numerous students and triggered considerable debate from parents.
key_points: 複雜子句結構：not only...but also
現在完成式 has affected / has sparked
hints: 提示1：虛主詞 It appears/seems 後接包含並列連詞或複雜時態的完整子句，保持句型框架完整
提示2：注意 has affected（現在完成式）表示過去發生到現在的影響，常見錯誤是時態混亂或漏掉並列結構中的動詞
